name: Spiced Apricot Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients to a medium saucepan and stir well until combined.
2. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer for 30-35 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. When the chutney reaches a stiff consistency, remove from the pan and pour into 2-3 clean jam jars. Allow to cool completely. Store in the refrigerator.
